## About

This 1 room studio apartment is located in a well-kept, prewar building in Bay Ridge. Enjoy a wide variety of nearby shops and eateries plus the convenience of the nearby R train.

Apartment Features:

\* Hardwood Floors \* One Closet \* Full Bath
